name: landing-screen-first-launch
description: First-launch baseline — Qualia boots with localStorage cleared, the LandingScreen modal appears with the Standard profile pre-selected. Screenshot captures the full window so any chrome / modal layout regression shows up.

setup.vlmDescription: A modal dialog titled 'Configure Qualia' centered over a dimmed background. Below the title is a row of four selectable 'profile pills' labeled Minimal, Standard, Cinematic, Workshop, and a fifth Custom pill. The Standard pill should be visibly highlighted (active state). Below the pills is a scrollable list of module rows organized by group ('Core', 'FX', 'Workshop', etc.), each row showing a checkbox, label, description, and a colored cost badge (Cheap / Medium / Expensive). At the bottom: a count summary ('N / M modules enabled') and Cancel + Apply buttons. The layout should be clean and uncluttered — checkboxes vertically aligned with their labels, no overlapping pills, no overlapping rows.
